articles.title: Starbucks Corporation $SBUX Shares Purchased by Allstate Corp
articles.summary: Allstate Corp significantly increased its stake in Starbucks Corporation ($SBUX) by 104.3% in the fourth quarter, now owning 84,304 shares valued at $7.099 million. This news comes as Starbucks stock recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend. However, the company faces some negative sentiment due to exiting an AI inventory program and a sharp drop in Korean sales following a controversial marketing campaign.

articles.title: Starbucks Mexico launches latest edition of coffee plant donation initiative
articles.summary: Starbucks Mexico, operated by Alsea, has launched the 12th edition of its ‘Todos Sembramos Café’ initiative, aiming to donate over 800,000 rust-resistant coffee plants across Chiapas, Puebla, and Veracruz. This program, which started in 2014, has already provided more than 6.4 million plants to coffee-growing regions and benefited over 20,000 producers. For the 2026 edition, 60% of the plants will be Starbucks-developed varietals known for productivity and climate adaptability, reflecting an evolution toward long-term agricultural solutions and community resilience.
